collection_stop_reason: Three recurring composition families each reached support from at least three references and two channels.

success_proxy_policy.allowed_use: descriptive surface-visible proxy only, alongside age and repeated-layout observation

surface_observation.note: Public search cards were observed without authentication. YouTube app frame selection remains an operator gate.

legacy_reference_reassessment.reassessment: Retained as secondary structure history. They do not override the current exact-surface vertical corpus.

native_vertical_surface_defaults.translation_note: Extract only recurring spatial relationships and scale. Do not reuse reference pixels, people, logos, colors, fonts, or decoration.

candidate_directions.family_name_ja: 大顔リアクション＋上部見出し
candidate_directions.speaker: Hajime
adopted_relationships: one oversized headline above the eyes
candidate_directions.fit_reason: The accepted complaint beat contains a direct frontal shock expression and the current vertical corpus repeatedly uses one large face under one top headline.

candidate_directions.family_name_ja: 話者最大の非対称二者
candidate_directions.speaker: Hajime
source_frame_roles: Hajime front-facing clenched complaint reaction as dominant
Noel front three-quarter reaction as secondary

copy_evidence.accepted_text: なんで来なかったんすか！！

candidate_directions.frame_selection_note: Dense in-range survey showed Hajime back-facing throughout the spoken line. The nearest truthful frontal complaint beat from the same accepted cut is used for Hajime; the exact-line Noel reaction remains secondary.
adopted_relationships: speaker reaction remains the largest element
secondary listener is independently cut out and clearly subordinate
one shared headline describes the exchange
candidate_directions.fit_reason: The absence question needs both roles, but the speaker remains visually dominant and readable at Shorts tile scale.

candidate_directions.family_name_ja: 片寄せリアクション＋側面大見出し
candidate_directions.speaker: Hajime
source_frame_roles: Hajime front-facing open-mouth complaint reaction offset from center

copy_evidence.accepted_text: ずっと待ってたんすよ！！

candidate_directions.frame_selection_note: Dense in-range survey showed Hajime back-facing. A distinct nearby frontal complaint frame from the same accepted cut preserves the actual expression without generation or pose change.
adopted_relationships: two large headline blocks share the central safe zone
simple original graphic field leaves the face independent
candidate_directions.fit_reason: The accepted waiting complaint can be expressed as a single speaker-led offset reaction without promoting Noel or reusing a scene panel.
